title: Shabib's Second Entry into al-Kiifah and His Battle with al-Hajjaj
description: with al-Hajjaj According to Hishim-Abu Mikhnaf--Musa b. Suwar: Sabrah b. 'Abd al-Ralamin b. Mikhnaf came from al -Daskarah to al-Kufah after the Syrian army had arrived there. Mutarrif b. al-Mughirah had written to al-Hajjaj saying, "Shabib is upon me; send an expeditionary force to al-Mada'in!" and al-Hajjaj had sent him Sabrah b. 'Abd al-Rabmin b. Mikhnaf with two hundred horsemen. When Mutarrif set out for al-Jabal, he took his men with him, having informed them of his intentions;417 but he did not tell Sabrah.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
